title: No special requests needed — eggless cakes near Rosehill and Camellia
summary:
A vegetarian family in Rosehill shouldn't have to ask if a cake has eggs. Neither should a halal-observant family in Camellia. At Num Nums, every cake is 100% eggless — vegetarian and halal-friendly by default, not by special request.

Six sizes, 15 flavours including Rasmalai and Mango, buttercream, fondant or ganache. Custom designs from your photo reference, made at Harris Park since 2019.

48 hours minimum notice — that's what fresh baking actually takes. Open daily until 10pm on Wigram Street, a short drive from Rosehill and Camellia.

Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: Rosehill and Camellia near Harris Park
eggless cake without a special request
